sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Insulet announces recall of Omnipod 5 Pods due to insulin delivery issue
feed.summary: Insulet Corporation has issued a recall for specific lots of its Omnipod 5 Pods in the U.S. due to a manufacturing defect that can cause insulin to leak internally, leading to under-delivery to users. The company has reported 18 serious adverse events, including hospitalizations and diabetic ketoacidosis, but no fatalities. Consumers are advised to check their Pod lot numbers online and replace any affected Pods, with Insulet ensuring continued production and availability.

feed.title: Wolfe Research Boosts Occidental Petroleum (NYSE:OXY) Price Target to $70.00
feed.summary: Wolfe Research has increased its price target for Occidental Petroleum (NYSE:OXY) to $70.00 from $67.00, reiterating an "outperform" rating and suggesting an 11.8% upside. This comes as Occidental Petroleum recently reported strong Q4 EPS of $0.31, surpassing estimates, and institutional investors hold a significant portion of its stock. Despite this optimistic revision, the overall analyst consensus for OXY remains a "Hold" with an average target price of $59.52.

feed.title: Amgen (AMGN) Reveals Positive Phase 3 Results for Subcutaneous T
feed.summary: Amgen has announced positive Phase 3 trial results for a subcutaneous version of Tepezza, administered via an on-body injector for Thyroid Eye Disease (TED). The new formulation showed similar efficacy to the intravenous standard, achieving a 77% proptosis response rate. Despite strong revenue growth, the company faces declining margins and a high debt-to-equity ratio, with recent insider selling noted.

feed.title: Evercore Lowers KeyCorp (NYSE:KEY) Price Target to $24.00

feed.title: Global Payments’ $600 Million Synergy Plan Kicks Off: Analysts Set a $100 Target
feed.summary: Global Payments (GPN) is projected for significant growth following its Worldpay acquisition and Issuer Solutions divestiture, targeting 13-15% adjusted EPS growth for 2026. The company plans a $7.5 billion capital return by 2027, including a $2.5 billion share repurchase, driven by $600 million in Worldpay expense synergies. Analysts set a median price target of $95, while TIKR's model suggests a $111.28 price by 2030, indicating substantial undervaluation given the accelerated EPS growth.

feed.title: Hologic Inc stock hits 52-week high at $76.01
feed.summary: Hologic Inc.'s stock reached a new 52-week high of $76.01, indicating strong investor confidence and a 24.3% return over the past year. Despite slightly missing Q1 earnings estimates, the company is undergoing a CEO transition and recently gained FDA approval for its Aptima HPV Assay for primary screening, signaling ongoing strategic developments. InvestingPro analysis suggests the stock is fairly valued with a "GREAT" financial health score.

feed.title: Diamondback Energy Launches Tender Offers for Long-Term Notes
feed.summary: Diamondback Energy, Inc. has announced cash tender offers for its outstanding 4.400% Senior Notes due 2051 and 4.250% Senior Notes due 2052, totaling nearly $1 billion. The offers, expiring on April 10, 2026, aim to manage long-dated debt and potentially reduce interest costs, with settlement expected mid-April. Spark, TipRanks' AI Analyst, rates FANG as "Outperform" due to its strong financial resilience, positive earnings outlook, and reasonable valuation.

feed.title: I heard a cruise captain explain why ships cancel ports. It changed how I see itinerary changes
feed.summary: A cruise ship captain's explanation of port cancellations due to weather profoundly changed the author's perspective. Decisions to skip ports are not made for convenience or cost, but to prevent dangerous situations caused by rapidly changing and severe weather conditions like strong winds and large swells, often forecasted days in advance. These complex decisions involve multiple teams and expert meteorologists, prioritizing passenger safety over adherence to original itineraries.

feed.title: Circle CEO to visit Korea for meetings with KB Financial, Dunamu
feed.summary: Jeremy Allaire, CEO of U.S. digital currency firm Circle, is scheduled to visit South Korea for meetings with KB Financial Group and Dunamu. The discussions with KB Financial Group will focus on strengthening collaboration, exploring joint business opportunities related to USDC, cross-border transactions, and potentially issuing a Korean currency-backed stablecoin. Allaire will also meet with executives from Dunamu, the operator of South Korea's leading cryptocurrency exchange, Upbit.

feed.title: ConocoPhillips (NYSE:COP) Given New $144.00 Price Target at Wolfe Research
feed.summary: Wolfe Research has increased its price target for ConocoPhillips (NYSE:COP) to $144.00 from $138.00, maintaining an "outperform" rating and implying a 10.15% upside. This follows other brokers also raising their targets, though the consensus remains a "Moderate Buy" at $125.20. Despite missing quarterly earnings and recent insider sales, institutional investors still hold a significant 82.36% stake in the company.

feed.title: Kraft Heinz Becomes NFL’s First Condiment Partner In Five-Year Global Deal
feed.summary: The Kraft Heinz Co. and the National Football League have announced a five-year global strategic partnership, making Kraft Heinz the NFL's first global condiment partner. This deal brings a wide range of Kraft Heinz brands into NFL's high-profile moments, offering premium stadium visibility, co-branded marketing, and retail activations. The partnership aims to create incremental retail opportunities, support the NFL's international expansion, and engage millions of fans worldwide.

feed.title: Jefferies Maintains Sherwin-Williams(SHW.US) With Hold Rating, Cuts Target Price to $360
feed.summary: Jefferies analyst Laurence Alexander has reiterated a "hold" rating on Sherwin-Williams (SHW.US) but has lowered the target price from $370 to $360. According to TipRanks data, the analyst has a 48.0% success rate and a 0.0% average return over the past year. This adjustment reflects a modified outlook for the company's stock by Jefferies.

feed.title: Huntington Bank Named Official Consumer Bank of the University of Michigan
feed.summary: Huntington Bank has been named the Official Consumer Bank of the University of Michigan, deepening its commitment to the state. This exclusive partnership offers personalized banking services, financial education, and dedicated on-campus support, benefiting over 100,000 students, faculty, and staff with features like waived monthly fees, co-branded debit cards, and mortgage closing cost discounts. Huntington will also support the university through expanded financial literacy programs, career initiatives, and $250,000 in scholarships and sponsorships.

feed.title: How Ford Is Becoming an AI Stock After the Wheels Fell Off Its EV Strategy
feed.summary: Ford is drastically changing its EV strategy after a significant financial write-down, now focusing on building energy storage systems for AI data centers. This AI-centric pivot, following the company's struggles to profit from its initial EV investments, could provide a long-term growth catalyst in a market projected to exceed $100 billion by 2030, similar to Caterpillar's successful diversification into power and energy. While still developing some EV models, Ford is taking a less aggressive approach to all-electric vehicles, shifting instead to hybrids and extended-range EVs.

feed.title: Howmet Aerospace Completes Acquisition of Consolidated Aerospace Manufacturing
feed.summary: Howmet Aerospace (HWM) has completed its $1.8 billion cash acquisition of Consolidated Aerospace Manufacturing, a move that expands its aerospace component portfolio and strengthens its competitive standing. Analysts rate HWM as a Buy with a $271.00 price target. TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates HWM as Outperform due to strong financial performance, despite concerns about valuation and execution risks.

feed.title: Japan Post unit trims AFLAC (NYSE: AFL) stake by 20,100 shares
feed.summary: Japan Post Holdings Co., Ltd., through an affiliated trust, sold 20,100 shares of AFLAC Inc. common stock on April 2, 2026, in open-market transactions with weighted average prices between $109.15 and $110.50 per share. Following these sales, entities associated with Japan Post Holdings indirectly hold 51,934,800 AFLAC shares. The shares are directly held by J&A Alliance Holdings Corporation as trustee of the J&A Alliance Trust, and Japan Post Holdings disclaims beneficial ownership beyond its pecuniary interest.

feed.title: Luxor and Excalibur debut MGM all-inclusive package starting at $330 for two nights
feed.summary: MGM Resorts International is launching a new all-inclusive vacation package at Luxor Hotel & Casino and Excalibur Hotel & Casino in Las Vegas. Starting at $330 plus tax for two nights, the package includes accommodations, three meals daily, two show tickets, two rides on The Big Apple Coaster, and self-parking. This offering aims to simplify travel planning and provide exceptional value for visitors to Las Vegas.

feed.title: 740,000 cooking pans sold at Costco, Walmart recalled, full refunds being offered
feed.summary: Approximately 740,000 Granitestone Diamond Pro Blue stainless steel sauté pans sold at Costco, Walmart, and Amazon have been recalled due to a safety hazard. The metal cap connecting the handle can detach violently when heated, leading to potential injury and burn risks. Consumers are advised to stop using the pans immediately and can return them for a full refund by contacting E Mishan & Sons, Inc.

feed.title: S&P Global Canada Services PMI Headline Index Recorded 47.2 In March, Up From 46.5 in February
feed.summary: The S&P Global Canada Services PMI Headline Index improved slightly in March, reaching 47.2, up from 46.5 in February. Despite this increase, the index remains below the 50-point threshold, indicating a contraction in the services sector. Recent news headlines suggest that ongoing global conflicts and demand issues are impacting various economies globally, including Canada.

feed.title: One Fast-Food Titan Rewards Investors and One Leaves Them Hungry
feed.summary: This article compares Restaurant Brands International (QSR) and Yum! Brands (YUM) for retirement-focused investors, considering valuation, income, and long-term performance. While Yum! has a better long-term track record driven by Taco Bell and KFC, RBI is deemed a stronger choice for income and value due to a cheaper forward multiple and higher dividend yield. The article concludes that RBI is better for retirement investors seeking income and value, while Yum! suits growth-oriented investors with a longer time horizon.

feed.title: Attackers Exploit RCE Flaw as 14,000 F5 BIG-IP APM Instances Remain Exposed
feed.summary: Attackers are actively exploiting a critical Remote Code Execution (RCE) flaw, CVE-2025-53521, in F5 BIG-IP APM instances, leaving over 14,000 vulnerable systems exposed online. The vulnerability, which was reclassified from a Denial-of-Service (DoS) issue in March 2026, has a CVSS score of 9.8 and allows RCE through specially crafted malicious traffic when an access policy is enabled. The U.S. CISA had already added this flaw to its Known Exploited Vulnerabilities catalog, ordering federal agencies to fix it by March 30, 2026.

feed.title: Deere Stock Back in Focus as Tarter USA Deal Brings U.S.-Made Frontier Cutters to Market
feed.summary: Deere & Co. is gaining attention for its new partnership with Tarter USA, introducing U.S.-made Frontier flex-wing rotary cutters. This move aims to tap into the market for cheaper implements as farmers cut back on larger equipment purchases due to low crop prices and high input costs. Despite Deere's stock showing a higher price-to-earnings ratio compared to peers, analysts suggest potential for growth, while the company itself anticipates a bottoming out of the current agricultural cycle in 2026.

feed.title: eBay (NASDAQ:EBAY) Price Target Cut to $100.00 by Analysts at Wells Fargo & Company

The company's financial performance, coupled with the increasing need for hard disk drives in AI workloads and cloud computing, further supports its positive outlook.

feed.title: American Express Company stock: What you need to know before investing now
feed.summary: This report provides a detailed analysis of American Express Company (AXP) stock, highlighting its business model, competitive advantages, and risks for global investors. It emphasizes Amex's premium brand, closed-loop network, and focus on high-spending customers, which contribute to resilient revenue streams. Analyst views are largely positive, recognizing the stock's defensive qualities and potential for growth in affluent spending, despite regulatory pressures and economic slowdown risks.

feed.title: Apple Stock Holds Up Monday As Traders Weigh iPhone 17 Demand Signals
feed.summary: Apple stock is showing resilience amid geopolitical tensions and reports of stronger-than-expected early demand for the iPhone 17, with cumulative panel shipments running above previous cycles. The company, celebrating its 50-year milestone, maintains a $3.73 trillion market cap and is viewed as a "quality tech" stock. Technically, AAPL is trading above key support, although recent momentum has cooled, and analysts maintain a Buy Rating with an average price target of $306.08.

feed.title: TER (NASDAQ: TER) Form 144: insider proposes sale of 625 shares twice
feed.summary: Teradyne (NASDAQ: TER) has filed a Form 144 indicating proposed sales of 625 shares of Common Stock in two separate transactions, scheduled for February 5, 2026, and March 5, 2026. The proposed sales are valued at $166,862.50 and $187,012.50, respectively, and originate from restricted stock vesting events in 2016 and 2017. The filing does not confirm completed sales but rather proposed transactions.

feed.title: GE Aerospace stock: Why the $190B backlog makes it a buy now
feed.summary: GE Aerospace, a pure-play aviation leader, is recommended as a buy due to its record $190 billion order backlog providing long-term revenue visibility. Despite a recent stock dip, the company's strong financial position, evidenced by a $15 billion share repurchase program and a 25% dividend increase, along with strategic initiatives like the RISE program, positions it for continued growth in the recovering air travel sector. Analysts maintain a bullish consensus, emphasizing the stock's quality and potential for margin expansion, though noting risks like supply chain issues and geopolitical tensions.

feed.title: Amgen scores with trial of on-body injected version of Tepezza in thyroid eye disease
feed.summary: Amgen has found a potential way to boost sales of its thyroid eye disease (TED) treatment, Tepezza, through a new patient-friendly subcutaneous injection administered via an on-body injector (OBI). A phase 3 trial demonstrated that Tepezza OBI achieved comparable efficacy to the current intravenous (IV) formulation, meeting its primary endpoint with a 77% proptosis response rate. This new delivery method aims to increase patient convenience and accessibility for the drug, which has seen stagnant sales despite being the only approved treatment for TED.

feed.title: Gilead Has Fallen 11% From Its 52-Week High. Is Now the Time to Buy GILD?
feed.summary: Gilead Sciences (GILD) stock has dropped 11% from its 52-week high, prompting investors to question if this presents a buying opportunity. The company recently made two major acquisitions, with the primary deal acquiring Arcellx for its CAR T-cell therapy anito-cel, awaiting FDA approval. Despite an expanded balance sheet, a strong HIV franchise, and multiple upcoming commercial launches targeted for 2026, the company faces risks like potential delays in drug approvals and impacts from the Inflation Reduction Act on Biktarvy's revenue.

feed.title: Quanta Services Just Unveiled Its Most Ambitious 5-Year Plan Yet. Here’s What It Means for Investors
feed.summary: Quanta Services has announced ambitious five-year targets, aiming for adjusted EPS of $21.60 to $26.75 by 2030 and revenue of $44 billion to $49 billion, driven by strategic partnerships with NiSource and AEP. The company's strong position in skilled labor, supply chain control, and negotiated contract models are key differentiators, justifying its high valuation despite market concerns about execution risk and timing. Investors should watch the technology and large-load segment's contribution to backlog for early indications of success.

feed.title: Blood Viscometer Market Is Going to Boom |• Thermo Fisher Scientific • Brookfield Engineering

feed.title: Janus Henderson B-BBB CLO ETF (JBBB) stock price, news, quote and history

It also lists related news and other ETFs that investors might consider.

feed.title: IDEX Corporation stock: What you should know now before investing
feed.summary: IDEX Corporation is an industrial company specializing in precision fluidics and fire safety solutions, offering exposure to resilient sectors like water treatment and healthcare. The article highlights its strong market position, diversified business segments (Fluid & Metering Technologies, Health & Science Technologies, and Fire & Safety/Diversified), and consistent financial performance, making it an attractive long-term investment for those seeking growth and stability. Analysts generally view IDEX positively, citing strong fundamentals and growth potential, though investors should monitor macroeconomic sensitivities and acquisition integration risks.

feed.title: US ends probe into Tesla remote driving feature after software updates
feed.summary: The U.S. National Highway Traffic Safety Administration (NHTSA) has closed its investigation into Tesla's "Actually Smart Summon" feature, which allows remote vehicle movement. The probe, covering nearly 2.6 million vehicles, concluded that the feature was linked primarily to low-speed incidents with minor property damage and no injuries or fatalities. Tesla has addressed these issues through software updates improving obstacle detection and vehicle response.
